'''Poas Trell''' was the executive aide to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[First Administrator]] [[Nanaod Engh]]. When [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] granted immediate membership of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]] under threat from the [[Yevetha]] after the [[Yevethan Purge]], Poas Trell acted as witness.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
